creator: sobomax@FreeBSD.org
text:
State Changed
From-To: open->closed

Have you tried to look through configure log before sending PR? 
[...] 
checking for correct rep-gtk version... no 
configure: error: You need rep-gtk version 0.14+ 
===>  Script "configure" failed: here are the contents of "config.log" 
[...] 
It clearly indicates that you need to update rep-gtk before trying to build saw.
